title: Ability to reorder dashboard status legend
excerpt: It would be great to be able to reorder the legend at the bottom of the Dashboard Gantt chart widget. Current format is: At risk, Completed, Not yet started, Off track, On track.

posts.author: RMBA (Charlotte K)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to reorder the legend at the bottom of the Dashboard Gantt chart widget. Current format is: At risk, Completed, Not yet started, Off track, On track.
